---
title: 'Overview'
---

Xorq provides command-line tools for building, running, serving, and cataloging
your data and ML pipelines.

## Project setup

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| [`init`](init.qmd) | Scaffold a new Xorq project from a template. |
| [`completion`](completion.qmd) | Print a shell-completion script. |
| [`install-completion`](install-completion.qmd) | Install the shell-completion script. |

## Build

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| [`build`](build.qmd) | Compile a Xorq expression into a reusable build artifact. |
| [`uv build`](uv-build.qmd) | Like `build`, but inside a uv-managed isolated environment. |

## Run

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| [`run`](run.qmd) | Execute a build artifact and write results in your chosen format. |
| [`uv run`](uv-run.qmd) | Like `run`, but inside a uv-managed isolated environment. |
| [`run-cached`](run-cached.qmd) | Run a build with a parquet cache wrapping the expression. |
| [`run-unbound`](run-unbound.qmd) | Run an unbound expression by streaming Arrow IPC input. |

## Serve

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| [`serve-flight-udxf`](serve-flight-udxf.qmd) | Serve an expression's UDXF nodes as an Arrow Flight endpoint. |
| [`serve-unbound`](serve-unbound.qmd) | Serve an unbound expression as an Arrow Flight endpoint. |

## Catalog

The `xorq catalog` group manages build-artifact catalogs — a versioned store of
named, sharable, executable expressions. Catalogs are git repositories with an
optional object-store backed annex for content.

### Repo lifecycle

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| [`catalog init`](catalog/init.qmd) | Create a new catalog repository. |
| [`catalog clone`](catalog/clone.qmd) | Clone an existing catalog from a remote URL. |
| [`catalog info`](catalog/info.qmd) | Show catalog summary metadata. |
| [`catalog default`](catalog/default.qmd) | Manage the persisted default catalog name. |
| [`catalog tui`](catalog/tui.qmd) | Browse the catalog interactively in a TUI. |

### Entries and aliases

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| [`catalog add`](catalog/add.qmd) | Add an entry from a build directory or archive. |
| [`catalog remove`](catalog/remove.qmd) | Remove entries by name. |
| [`catalog list`](catalog/list.qmd) | List entries. |
| [`catalog show`](catalog/show.qmd) | Show full metadata for an entry. |
| [`catalog schema`](catalog/schema.qmd) | Show schemas for an entry. |
| [`catalog get`](catalog/get.qmd) | Export an entry's archive to disk. |
| [`catalog add-alias`](catalog/add-alias.qmd) | Add an alias to an entry. |
| [`catalog remove-alias`](catalog/remove-alias.qmd) | Remove an alias. |
| [`catalog list-aliases`](catalog/list-aliases.qmd) | List registered aliases. |

### Composition and execution

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| [`catalog compose`](catalog/compose.qmd) | Compose entries into a new expression and persist it back to the catalog. |
| [`catalog run`](catalog/run.qmd) | Execute one or more entries and write results. |
| [`catalog run-cached`](catalog/run-cached.qmd) | `catalog run` with a parquet cache wrapper. |
| [`catalog serve-unbound`](catalog/serve-unbound.qmd) | Resolve an entry, unbind a node, and serve it as an Arrow Flight endpoint. |

### Sync, audit, replay

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| [`catalog push`](catalog/push.qmd) | Push to remote(s). |
| [`catalog pull`](catalog/pull.qmd) | Pull from remote(s). |
| [`catalog sync`](catalog/sync.qmd) | Pull then push. |
| [`catalog embed-readonly`](catalog/embed-readonly.qmd) | Embed read-only credentials for shared consumers. |
| [`catalog check`](catalog/check.qmd) | Validate catalog consistency. |
| [`catalog log`](catalog/log.qmd) | Show the catalog's operation history. |
| [`catalog replay`](catalog/replay.qmd) | Replay history into a target catalog (mirror/migrate). |
